basic_details.job_title: District Panchayat Kabirdham Accounts cum MIS Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: District Panchayat Kabirdham (DP Kabirdham) Accounts cum MIS Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website www.kawardha.gov.in . A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the DP Kabirdham Accounts cum MIS Assistant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age Relaxation: As per instructions issued by the General Administration Department from time to time for Chhattisgarh Residents and various categories.

qualification.details: Accounts cum MIS Assistant: Graduate in Commerce from a recognized university. One-year diploma in Computer from a recognized institute/university. Desirable: Tally Certificate, 2 years of experience. Experience: 02 years of work experience in accounting related field from Central/State Government/Local Body/Government Aided Institution (institutions listed on NITI Aayog website) after graduation.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for District Panchayat Kabirdham Accounts cum MIS Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.kawardha.gov.in, www.bihan.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-04-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

District Panchayat Kabirdham Accounts cum MIS Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the District Panchayat Kabirdham Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: District Panchayat Kabirdham Accounts cum MIS Assistant Vacancy 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Accounts cum MIS Assistant: Graduate in Commerce from a recognized university. One-year diploma in Computer from a recognized institute/university. Desirable: Tally Certificate, 2 years of experience. Experience: 02 years of work experience in accounting related field from Central/State Government/Local Body/Government Aided Institution (institutions listed on NITI Aayog website) after graduation.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age Relaxation: As per instructions issued by the General Administration Department from time to time for Chhattisgarh Residents and various categories.

content_sections.heading: District Panchayat Kabirdham Accounts cum MIS Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for District Panchayat Kabirdham Accounts cum MIS Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.kawardha.gov.in, www.bihan.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-04-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: District Panchayat Kabirdham Accounts cum MIS Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the District Panchayat Kabirdham Accounts cum MIS Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the District Panchayat Kabirdham Accounts cum MIS Assistant recruitment is 17 April 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Accounts cum MIS Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Graduate degree in Commerce and a one-year diploma in Computer from a recognized institution.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Accounts cum MIS Assistant position?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Accounts cum MIS Assistant post is between 21 years and 35 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Accounts cum MIS Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a fixed monthly salary of 23,350.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any experience required for this post?
faq.answer: Yes, 2 years of experience in accounting-related fields from government or government-aided institutions after graduation is desirable.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Accounts cum MIS Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on merit-based shortlisting followed by a skill test.

faq.question: Q8. Which district is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for District Panchayat Kabirdham, Chhattisgarh.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from other states apply for this post?
faq.answer: The notification mentions age relaxation for Chhattisgarh Residents. It is advisable to check the official notification for details regarding eligibility for candidates from other states.

faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the District Panchayat Kabirdham लेखा सह MIS सहायक recruitment is 17 April 2026.
